ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition; Ref: TRM- 2 0 2 6 / A C Q - 07 (Internal Draft; Malaysia)

Parties and Transaction: Seri Purnama Holdings Berhad (listed on Bursa Malaysia; Company No. 201101012345 (999999-W)) to acquire 70% equity interest in Aurora Nusantara Sdn Bhd from existing shareholders via a conditional share sale agreement.

Consideration and Financing: Total purchase price RM210,000,000; funding mix of RM120,000,000 Shariah-compliant Commodity Murabahah facility from Meranti Capital Bank Berhad (profit rate 4.20% p.a., 5-year tenor, security over target shares) and RM90,000,000 from internal cash.

Termination: If regulatory approvals are not obtained by the long stop date, either party may terminate; break fee RM5,000,000 payable by buyer only if failure arises solely from buyer’s financing default.

must_detect.matched_text:
Term Sheet — Proposed Acquisition; Ref: TRM- 2 0 2 6 / A C Q - 07 (Internal Draft; Malaysia)
Parties and Transaction: Seri Purnama Holdings Berhad (listed on Bursa Malaysia; Company No. 201101012345 (999999-W)) to acquire 70% equity interest in Aurora Nusantara Sdn Bhd from existing shareholders via a conditional share sale agreement.
Consideration and Financing: Total purchase price RM210,000,000; funding mix of RM120,000,000 Shariah-compliant Commodity Murabahah facility from Meranti Capital Bank Berhad (profit rate 4.20% p.a., 5-year tenor, security over target shares) and RM90,000,000 from internal cash.
Conditions Precedent: Shareholders’ approval under Chapter 10 of the Bursa Malaysia Securities Listing Requirements (Paragraph 10.06), SC/CMSA approvals where applicable, no breach of CMSA s.188 insider provisions, and completion of legal, financial, commercial and Shariah due diligence.
Confidentiality and MNPI: This document contains non‑public, price‑sensitive information; no trading in Seri Purnama securities by insiders is permitted until announcement; disclosure will be made per LR 9.03 and SC guidelines.
Deal Team Contact (Internal Use): Encik Farid Jamal, Chief Financial Officer, Seri Purnama Holdings Berhad, born 14‑02‑1984 (age 42), based at Level 23, Menara Teratai, Jalan Damansara, 47400 Petaling Jaya; device host SPH‑LTP‑118; employee ID SPH‑EMP‑042; cost centre CC‑1030‑88; expense wallet acct EW‑552019; work email f.jamal@seripurnama.example.my; last session tag sID=7a9c- 11 KL- 0426 over Wi‑Fi SSID “SPH_Guest_12”.
Representations and Warranties: Standard reps on title, capacity, compliance, no undisclosed liabilities; no MAC (material adverse change) condition precedent applies; valuation references incorporate public-source industry indices without reliance on any personal data.
PDPA Note: Any personal data processed in connection with this transaction will be handled in accordance with the Personal Data Protection Act 2010; consents to be procured as needed; board packs to use redacted or anonymised identifiers.
Timeline and Escrow: Target signing Q3 2026; long stop date 31 December 2026; 10% deposit into escrow with Bayu Trustee Services (M) Berhad, Escrow Ref: BYT‑ES‑2026‑07711 (non‑interest bearing).
Non‑attributable Examples (for templates only): “DOB 03/03/1991” and device tag “A1‑B2‑C3” shown in training slides are generic placeholders and are not linked to any person or this transaction.
Due Diligence Scope: Financial (audits FY2023–FY2025), tax, HR (no collection of employee NRICs prior to completion), IT (system logs only), environmental, and Shariah screening for facility compliance.
Announcements: Upon execution of the SPA, immediate announcement to Bursa Malaysia to avoid a false market, followed by circular to shareholders and independent advice letter per LR requirements.
Termination: If regulatory approvals are not obtained by the long stop date, either party may terminate; break fee RM5,000,000 payable by buyer only if failure arises solely from buyer’s financing default.
